title: i18n key manifest + new report strings across all 5 catalogs

files_forbidden: any source, component, route, scanner, or test file

acceptance_criteria: Add a stable, documented set of new report strings under the existing report/scan sections, the SAME key paths in all 5 catalogs (en, hi, ml, es, de). Keys must cover: lab-score label, real-user verdict label + the verbatim Google categories (FAST/AVERAGE/SLOW shown to users in localized words), 'no real-user data for this site', best-practices grade label, the 'performance not measured (provider unavailable)' UNAVAILABLE state, the desktop section label + the subordinate disclaimer 'informational — headline grade is mobile (Google's default)', and the cache-staleness disclosure 'results may be cached up to ~5 minutes'.

English (en.json) carries the authoritative human copy; the other 4 locales carry faithful translations consistent with the existing tone of each catalog (do not leave English placeholders in non-en files).
Key names/paths are identical across all 5 files (no missing key in any locale — next-intl must not fall back/break).
A short key manifest comment or section is provided in the task output listing every new key path so T-08 (UI) consumes exactly these keys.
Existing keys are untouched; JSON remains valid; npm run lint and npm run test pass.
output_format: the exact new key manifest (list of key paths) plus the JSON edits, and a one-line note per locale confirming translation (not placeholder)
